title: Kinoite linux-map row (optional TSV/CSV under host-local)
description: One row of an app or workload mapping from Windows evidence to a Linux or repo disposition. Use in host-local only; this schema is for shape validation, not committed data.

name_or_title.description: Windows app name, shortcut, or short title

windows_evidence.description: Winget id, path, or pointer into imports/

kinoite_path.description: Target: Flatpak id, doc section, N/A, VM-only, or blocked
